_claim: M3 — Universe Planck-cell count: N = (4/3) pi R_H^3 / ell_P^3 ~ 10^185

R_H.source: Observable-universe particle-horizon proper distance in LCDM; roughly 3.25 * c / H_0 with H_0 ~ 70 km/s/Mpc. Session brief value.

ell_P_shortform.source: Session brief — 4-sig-fig Planck length. Precise computation from hbar,G,c gives 1.61625502e-35.

N_baryon_observable.source: Standard cosmology estimate — order of magnitude. E.g. critical density / m_proton ~ 10^80 for observable universe.
